parameters.query: UPDATE agente_camaleon_sessoes SET historico = '...', updated_at = NOW() WHERE phone = '={{ $("Extrair Dados WAHA").first().json.phone }}';

parameters.name: chatId
parameters.value: ={{ $('Extrair Dados WAHA').first().json.phone.includes('@') ? $('Extrair Dados WAHA').first().json.phone : $('Extrair Dados WAHA').first().json.phone + '@c.us' }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={{ $('Chamar Claude MKT').first()?.json?.content?.[0]?.text || $('Chamar Claude EST').first()?.json?.content?.[0]?.text || $('Chamar Claude SAU').first()?.json?.content?.[0]?.text || 'Erro na resposta' }}
